sprint.goal: Fix false-positive destructive matcher (#1119) + SQLite Node 22 binary compat (#1144).

senior.title: fix: destructive matcher false positives (#1119) + SQLite Node 22 compat (#1144)
senior.note: #1119: command-scanner fires on heredoc/inline-Python argument content containing destructive pattern strings — should only match the command being executed, not its arguments or stdin content. #1144: better-sqlite3 binaries compiled for Node 18 (MODULE_VERSION 115), Node 22 requires MODULE_VERSION 127. Fix: postinstall version check + auto-rebuild, or publish prebuilt Node 22 binaries. --no-sqlite workaround exists (PR #1147) but root cause still open.

previousSprint.goal: Fix governance startup in worktrees (#1118 via --no-sqlite flag) + CI stability (#1142 AGENTGUARD_GO_TIMEOUT).
previousSprint.note: PR #1147 merged — closes #1118 and #1142. Issue #955 closed upstream 2026-03-26.

prs.title: fix(claude-init): write hooks with full binary path (closes #964)
fix: --no-sqlite guard flag + AGENTGUARD_GO_TIMEOUT for CI stability (closes #1118, closes #1142)

testHealth.delta: +4 storage tests (none backend) vs previous QA run
